productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Casual Sandals
description: Float in comfort with the stylish sandal collection from lee cooper. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. Upper Nu-buck and nylon on the foot-bed for maximum style and durability Perforations on the straps for breathable comfort Upper with forefoot and ankle straps, coupled with velcro fasteners providing a snug, customized Fit Embossed logo on the mid foot strap for style Mid-sole Textured foot-bed for soft, massage feel and all-day comfort Out-sole TPU out-sole with multi-directional pattern for greater traction Lugs to provide greater durability Out-sole stitched to the mid-sole for enhanced durability shoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
